title: callitriche palustris subsp. pedunculata
intro: Callitriche palustris subsp. pedunculata, also known as floating water-starwort, is a subspecies of aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help soothe skin irritations and infections. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Callitriche palustris subsp. pedunculata typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various ailments.
